name: proyecto-viviana-monorepo
description: Monorepo for Proyecto Viviana SolidJS libraries

scripts.build: bun run --cwd packages/solid-stately build && bun run --cwd packages/solidaria build && bun run --cwd packages/solidaria-components build && bun run --cwd packages/ui build
scripts.test:e2e: bun run --cwd apps/web bunx playwright test
scripts.publish:packages: npm publish --workspace=packages/solid-stately && npm publish --workspace=packages/solidaria && npm publish --workspace=packages/solidaria-components && npm publish --workspace=packages/ui
scripts.release: bun run build && bun run publish:packages
